title: gouldia axillaris var. hawaiiensis
intro: Gouldia axillaris var. hawaiiensis, also known as the Hawaiian gouldia, is a rare and endemic shrub native to the island of Hawaii. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Gouldia axillaris var. hawaiiensis are attributed to its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
